title: Mozi: Universal Love
description: Mozi's radical argument: if everyone loved others as they love themselves, war, theft, and hatred would cease.
introduction: Mozi's radical argument: if everyone loved others as they love themselves, war, theft, and hatred would cease.

translation.original_text: 天下之人皆相愛，強不執弱，眾不劫寡，富不侮貧，貴不敖賤。
translation.text: If everyone in the world loved one another, the strong would not overpower the weak, the many would not oppress the few, the rich would not insult the poor, the noble would not be contemptuous of the humble.
